description: Ensure the contrast between foreground and background colors meets WCAG 2 AA minimum contrast ratio thresholds

  Element has insufficient color contrast of 3.53 (foreground color: #c83500, background color: #d3d3d3, font size: 10.8pt (14.4px), font weight: normal). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1
